flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Wilson College fell 33% between 2006 and 2009 (62.9% → 41.9%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Wilson College rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 ($21.8k → $26.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wilson College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Wilson College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (64.7% → 74.5%).
